annexIV.title: Annex IV Technical Documentation
annexIV.subtitle: EU AI Act Article 11 Requirements
annexIV.section1Content: This section provides a detailed description of the AI system, its intended purpose, and the persons or groups of persons on which the system is intended to be used.
annexIV.section2Content: Description of the AI model architecture, algorithms, data requirements, and technical specifications.
annexIV.section3Content: Documentation of the risk management system as required by Article 9 of the EU AI Act.
annexIV.section4Content: Description of human oversight measures implemented to ensure safe operation (Article 14).
annexIV.section5Content: Documentation of measures to ensure appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity (Article 15).
annexIV.section6Content: Description of the post-market monitoring system as required by Article 72.
annexIV.disclaimer: This is a template document. All placeholder sections must be completed with specific information about your AI system. This is not legal advice.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom solutions for large organizations with dedicated support, white-label options, and tailored compliance workflows.

q1.question: What's included in the free plan?
q1.answer: The Free plan lets you classify 1 AI system, see compliance gaps, and get an 'AI Act Aware' badge. It's perfect for exploring the EU AI Act requirements with no commitment.

q2.question: Can I change plans later?
q2.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the end of your billing cycle.

q3.question: What regulations do you cover?
q3.answer: We currently support EU AI Act, Colorado AI Act (SB 24-205), NYC Local Law 144, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and UAE AI Ethics principles. Professional and Scale plans include all regulations.

q4.question: Is my data secure?
q4.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We're SOC 2 Type II compliant and GDPR-ready. Your compliance data never leaves our secure EU infrastructure.

q5.question: Do you offer refunds?
q5.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 14 days of your first payment for a full refund. See our Refund Policy for details.

q6.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q6.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and support multiple currencies. Payments are processed securely through Paddle, our Merchant of Record.

about.title: About Complyance
about.subtitle: Making AI compliance accessible for every SaaS company

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: The EU AI Act is the world's first comprehensive AI regulation, and it affects thousands of SaaS companies selling into Europe. But compliance tools built for Fortune 500 companies are out of reach for most SMBs.
mission.p2: We built Complyance to democratize AI compliance. No legal team required. No enterprise budget needed. Just clear guidance and practical tools to help you ship compliant AI products.

problem.title: The Problem We're Solving
problem.p1: Most AI compliance platforms are designed for large enterprises with dedicated legal teams and budgets starting at $50,000/year. They require consultants to implement, months to onboard, and constant legal support to maintain.
problem.p2: Meanwhile, thousands of SaaS founders are building with AI — chatbots, recommendation engines, CV screening tools, fraud detection systems — without realizing they're subject to high-risk AI regulations.
problem.p3: The EU AI Act deadline is August 2, 2026. Missing it means fines up to €35M or 7% of global revenue. But hiring a compliance consultant costs $15,000+ per system. For most SMBs, that's not an option.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.subtitle: Self-serve AI compliance management for teams that can't afford enterprise platforms

automated.title: Automated Risk Classification
automated.desc: Our AI engine analyzes your system against EU AI Act Annex III categories and tells you if you're high-risk in minutes, not months.

actionable.title: Actionable Compliance Roadmaps
actionable.desc: Get a step-by-step plan with deadlines, priorities, and plain-English explanations of what you need to do.

affordable.title: Affordable for SMBs
affordable.desc: Starting at $99/month. No consultants required. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

classify.title: Risk Classification
classify.desc: Determine if your AI system is high-risk, limited-risk, or minimal-risk under the EU AI Act, Colorado AI Act, and other regulations.

gaps.title: Gap Analysis
gaps.desc: Identify exactly which compliance requirements you're missing and what you need to do to meet them.

documents.title: Document Generation
documents.desc: Generate compliance reports, technical documentation (Annex IV), and roadmaps with one click.

vendors.title: Vendor Risk Assessment
vendors.desc: Assess AI vendors (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) for compliance risks and data processing practices.

updates.title: Regulatory Intelligence
updates.desc: Stay up to date with new guidelines, enforcement actions, and regulatory changes that affect your AI systems.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.desc: Complyance is a compliance management tool, not a law firm. Our platform helps organize and track compliance work, but it does not constitute legal advice. For regulatory filings or certification, consult with qualified legal professionals.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant?
cta.subtitle: Start with our free plan and classify your first AI system in 5 minutes. No credit card required.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: Complyance respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our AI compliance management platform.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.usage: Usage data (AI systems classified, documents generated)
dataCollection.technical: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)
dataCollection.documents: Documents you upload for AI analysis (encrypted at rest)

usage.title: How We Use Your Data
usage.service: To provide and improve our compliance management services
usage.ai: To classify AI systems and generate compliance reports using Claude API
usage.billing: To process payments via Paddle (our Merchant of Record)
usage.communication: To send service updates, regulatory alerts, and compliance notifications

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.anthropic: Anthropic (Claude API) - AI classification and document analysis
thirdParties.paddle: Paddle - Payment processing and subscription management
thirdParties.aws: AWS S3 - Encrypted document storage (EU region)
thirdParties.desc: We never sell your data. Third parties process data only as necessary to provide services.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.essential: Essential cookies for authentication and session management
cookies.analytics: Analytics cookies to improve platform performance (optional)
cookies.desc: You can control cookie preferences in your browser settings.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.active: Account data retained while subscription is active
retention.grace: 30-day grace period after cancellation before deletion
retention.legal: Some data retained longer for legal compliance (e.g., billing records)

gdprRights.access: Right to access your personal data
gdprRights.erasure: Right to delete your data ('right to be forgotten')
gdprRights.portability: Right to export your data in machine-readable format
gdprRights.desc: To exercise these rights, contact privacy@complyance.io

security.title: Security
security.encryption: All data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3)
security.access: Role-based access controls and audit logs
security.desc: We follow industry best practices to protect your data.

disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.notAdvice: Complyance is a compliance management tool, not a law firm or legal advisor.
disclaimer.informational: All classifications, reports, and recommendations are informational only and do not constitute legal advice.
disclaimer.professional: For regulatory filings, certifications, or legal opinions, consult with qualified legal professionals.
disclaimer.liability: We are not liable for compliance failures, regulatory fines, or legal consequences resulting from use of our platform.

YES.label: Yes - Makes autonomous decisions

seo.title: Free AI Act Risk Classifier | Check Your AI System Risk Level
seo.description: Find out if your AI system is high-risk under the EU AI Act in 2 minutes. Free online tool, no signup required. Instant classification results.
seo.whatIsTitle: What is the EU AI Act Risk Classifier?
seo.whatIsContent: The EU AI Act classifies AI systems into four risk levels: Unacceptable, High, Limited, and Minimal. High-risk AI systems must comply with strict requirements before August 2, 2026. Use this free tool to quickly determine your AI system's risk classification and understand your compliance obligations.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: No signup, no payment. Get instant results.

fast.title: 2-Minute Assessment
fast.description: Answer simple questions and get your classification.

accurate.title: Based on EU AI Act
accurate.description: Classification follows official Annex III criteria.
